ab: pitju a tukiyan ka djemaljun aken i kakituluwan a vuaq.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: patagilj anga kitulu, tjumaq ti sinsi i tatuluan, qivu a nia penuvuluvulung, “gacalju! kisukubi! aya.”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: pasiqaca amen a qivu ta, “navenala sun sinsi aya amen.”
ka kitulutulu amen, tuluan amen ni sinsi tua supu nua kinacalisianan.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the paiwan language of numbers.

ab: kilayng amen tjay sinsi a semupu, semenay amen tua sasupuan a senay.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: liav anga aravac a ku kinacaqu a kinacalisianan.
en: I have learned many paiwan languages.

ab: piqadav aken a sema kakituluan, piqadav aken a kicaquan tua kinacalisianan, muri ku siqayvu a palangda tjay kina.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the paiwan language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
